---
title: "Vinzens, Claudia"			#add name and title here
description: "Administration"			#Postdoc, PhD student, ...
image: Portrait_Placeholder.png			#insert link to image
categories: [all]				#pi | all
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  links:
    #see a list of available icons here: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:vinzens@phys.ethz.ch		#add email here
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/			#add github page here
    - icon: globe
      text: Homepage
      href: "#"					#add personal homepage here

						#add other information

#add Description about yourself here
---
Add Description
